g.text: Kubernetes KMS API v2 - k8s.io/kms/apis/v2 & KMS Plugin for PKCS #11
KMS v2 & Kubernetes first startup & Status heartbeet
run k8s-kms-plugin serve with a KEK stored on the TPM or HSM
at startup and cache it ; indefinite
KMS v2 first Encrypts DEK Seed
encrypt DEK seed with remote KEK
return encrypted DEK seed & KEK ID,
{Ciphertext:<encrypted DEK seed as base64 encoded JWE []byte>,
[every minute when plugin is healthy or every 10 seconds when the plugin is not healthy]
Kubernetes KMS v2 & k8s-kms-plugin Figure 1 of 1
